prestazioni: Engine swap to a GM LSX 454 (LS7-based) crate engine (engine code: LSX454R) with forged internals, ported LS7 cylinder heads, and a custom billet crankshaft for 850+ HP on E85 fuel. Paired with a Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission with a twin-disc McLeod RST clutch and a 2.97:1 final drive ratio for drag strip optimization.

Forced induction via a Precision Turbo & Engine PT9280CE turbocharger (80mm, 1.28 A/R) with a custom 4-inch stainless steel exhaust system featuring Burns Stainless merge collectors and a MagnaFlow 30-inch muffler for backpressure optimization. Intercooled with a PWR USA 4-core front-mount intercooler and a Bosch 044 fuel pump with dual Aeromotive A1000 regulators for E85 compatibility.

Suspension overhaul with a full BC Racing BR coilover kit (8kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear) paired with Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and polyurethane bushings. Braking upgraded to Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (380mm rotors front, 355mm rear) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and stainless steel braided lines. Wheels: Forgeline GA3R 18x10.5 +25 front and 18x12 +45 rear with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/18 front, 315/30/18 rear).
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny Nomad-specific widebody kit (fiberglass fenders, carbon fiber front splitter, and rear diffuser) with a custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap and blacked-out trim. Front bumper replaced with a custom fabricated unit featuring integrated LED fog lights (Morimoto XB) and a carbon fiber hood with a functional scoop for intercooler ducting.

Interior stripped and reupholstered with Recaro Pole Position seats (cloth/Alcantara) and a custom roll cage (Chassisworks 8-point bolt-in) with harness bar. Steering wheel replaced with a NRG Innovations 350mm suede wheel and a quick-release hub. Gauges upgraded to a Motec C127 digital dash with AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor integration.

Lighting upgraded to LUX H8 V4 LED headlights with custom HID projectors and sequential turn signals. Rear taillights replaced with custom CNC-machined LED units (inspired by 1957 Nomad design) and a custom carbon fiber rear spoiler (Seibon) with adjustable angle for downforce tuning.
